def positive_read_then_splitlines():
    rule_id = "read_then_splitlines"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "File contents are fully read and then splitlines() is called instead of streaming lines."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
